SEARCH
Package com.example.eventsapp

Class Users

java.lang.Object
com.example.eventsapp.Users
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class Users extends Object implements Serializable
Represents a user in the EventsApp system. A user can be an entrant, organizer, or admin. This class stores user profile information, account settings, and event-related lists.
See Also:
  • Serialized Form

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Users()
    No-argument constructor required for Firestore deserialization.
    Users(String name, String email, String password, String phoneNumber)
    Constructor for creating a user with basic info.
    Users(String firstName, String lastName, String email, String location, String accountType, boolean notificationsEnabled)
    Constructor used for initializing a user session.
    Users(String firstName, String lastName, String email, String password, String phoneNumber, String deviceId)
    Constructor used during the sign-up process.

    Moves an event from invited/waitlisted to registered status.

    Adds a notification to the user's notification list.

    Gets the account type (e.g., Entrant, Organizer, Admin).

    Gets the list of invitations the user has declined.

    Gets the email address of the user.

    Returns the full name constructed from first and last name if available.

    Gets the unique document ID from Firestore.

    Gets the list of events the user has been invited to.

    Gets the user's password.

    Gets the user's phone number.

    Returns the URL of the user's profile picture stored in Firebase Storage.

    Gets the list of events the user is registered for.

  • Constructor Details

    • Users

      public Users()
      No-argument constructor required for Firestore deserialization.

    • Users

      public Users(String name, String email, String password, String phoneNumber)
      Constructor for creating a user with basic info.
      Parameters:
      name - The full name of the user.
      email - The email address of the user.
      password - The password for the user's account.
      phoneNumber - The phone number of the user.

    • Users

      public Users(String firstName, String lastName, String email, String location, String accountType, boolean notificationsEnabled)
      Constructor used for initializing a user session.
      Parameters:
      firstName - User's first name.
      lastName - User's last name.
      email - User's email.
      location - User's location.
      accountType - User's account type (e.g., "Entrant", "Organizer", "Admin").
      notificationsEnabled - Whether the user has enabled notifications.

    • Users

      public Users(String firstName, String lastName, String email, String password, String phoneNumber, String deviceId)
      Constructor used during the sign-up process.
      Parameters:
      firstName - User's first name.
      lastName - User's last name.
      email - User's email.
      password - User's chosen password.
      phoneNumber - User's phone number.
      deviceId - Unique ID of the device used for sign-up.

  • Method Details

    • getId

      public String getId()
      Gets the unique document ID from Firestore.
      Returns:
      The user's ID.

    • setId

      public void setId(String id)
      Sets the unique document ID from Firestore.
      Parameters:
      id - The user's ID.

    • getName

      public String getName()
      Gets the full name of the user.
      Returns:
      The full name.

    • setName

      public void setName(String name)
      Sets the full name of the user.
      Parameters:
      name - The full name.

    • getEmail

      public String getEmail()
      Gets the email address of the user.
      Returns:
      The email address.

    • setEmail

      public void setEmail(String email)
      Sets the email address of the user.
      Parameters:
      email - The email address.

    • getPassword

      public String getPassword()
      Gets the user's password.
      Returns:
      The password.

    • setPassword

      public void setPassword(String password)
      Sets the user's password.
      Parameters:
      password - The password.

    • getPhoneNumber

      public String getPhoneNumber()
      Gets the user's phone number.
      Returns:
      The phone number as a String.

    • setPhoneNumber

      public void setPhoneNumber(Object phoneNumber)
      Sets the user's phone number. Handles both String and Long types from Firestore.
      Parameters:
      phoneNumber - The phone number object.

    • getDeviceId

      public String getDeviceId()
      Gets the unique device ID associated with the user.
      Returns:
      The device ID.

    • setDeviceId

      public void setDeviceId(String deviceId)
      Sets the unique device ID associated with the user.
      Parameters:
      deviceId - The device ID.

    • login

      public boolean login(String email, String password)
      Validates user credentials.
      Parameters:
      email - The email to check.
      password - The password to check.
      Returns:
      True if credentials match, false otherwise.

      public String getFirstName()
      Gets the first name of the user.
      Returns:
      The first name.

    • setFirstName

      public void setFirstName(String firstName)
      Sets the first name of the user.
      Parameters:
      firstName - The first name.

      public String getLastName()
      Gets the last name of the user.
      Returns:
      The last name.

      Sets the last name of the user.
      Parameters:
      lastName - The last name.

    • getFullName

      public String getFullName()
      Returns the full name constructed from first and last name if available.
      Returns:
      The full name.

    • getLocation

      public String getLocation()
      Gets the user's location.
      Returns:
      The location.

    • setLocation

      public void setLocation(String location)
      Sets the user's location.
      Parameters:
      location - The location.

    • getAccountType

      public String getAccountType()
      Gets the account type (e.g., Entrant, Organizer, Admin).
      Returns:
      The account type.

    • setAccountType

      public void setAccountType(String accountType)
      Sets the account type.
      Parameters:
      accountType - The account type.

    • getProfilePictureUrl

      public String getProfilePictureUrl()
      Returns the URL of the user's profile picture stored in Firebase Storage.
      Returns:
      the profile picture URL, or null if the user has not uploaded one

    • setProfilePictureUrl

      public void setProfilePictureUrl(String profilePictureUrl)
      Sets the URL of the user's profile picture.
      Parameters:
      profilePictureUrl - a Firebase Storage download URL, or null to clear the picture

    • isNotificationsEnabled

      public boolean isNotificationsEnabled()
      Checks if notifications are enabled for the user.
      Returns:
      True if enabled, false otherwise.

    • setNotificationsEnabled

      public void setNotificationsEnabled(boolean notificationsEnabled)
      Sets whether notifications are enabled.
      Parameters:
      notificationsEnabled - True to enable, false to disable.

    • addNotification

      public void addNotification(UserNotification notification)
      Adds a notification to the user's notification list.
      Parameters:
      notification - The notification to add.

    • removeNotification

      public void removeNotification(UserNotification notification)
      Removes a notification from the user's list.
      Parameters:
      notification - The notification to remove.

    • getNotifications

      public List<UserNotification> getNotifications()
      Gets an unmodifiable list of the user's notifications.
      Returns:
      The list of notifications.

    • setNotifications

      public void setNotifications(List<UserNotification> notifications)
      Sets the user's notification list.
      Parameters:
      notifications - The list of notifications.

    • addInvitedEvent

      public void addInvitedEvent(String eventName)
      Adds an event name to the user's invited events list and removes it from waitlist if present.
      Parameters:
      eventName - The name of the event.

    • addWaitlistedEvent

      public void addWaitlistedEvent(String eventName)
      Adds an event name to the user's waitlisted events list.
      Parameters:
      eventName - The name of the event.

    • removeWaitlistedEvent

      public void removeWaitlistedEvent(String eventName)
      Removes an event name from the user's waitlist.
      Parameters:
      eventName - The name of the event.

    • acceptInvitation

      public void acceptInvitation(String eventName)
      Moves an event from invited/waitlisted to registered status.
      Parameters:
      eventName - The name of the event.

    • declineInvitation

      public void declineInvitation(String eventName)
      Moves an event from invited status to declined status.
      Parameters:
      eventName - The name of the event.

    • getInvitedEvents

      public List<String> getInvitedEvents()
      Gets the list of events the user has been invited to.
      Returns:
      Unmodifiable list of invited event names.

    • setInvitedEvents

      public void setInvitedEvents(List<String> invitedEvents)
      Sets the list of invited events.
      Parameters:
      invitedEvents - List of event names.

    • getRegisteredEvents

      public List<String> getRegisteredEvents()
      Gets the list of events the user is registered for.
      Returns:
      Unmodifiable list of registered event names.

    • setRegisteredEvents

      public void setRegisteredEvents(List<String> registeredEvents)
      Sets the list of registered events.
      Parameters:
      registeredEvents - List of event names.

    • getDeclinedInvitations

      public List<String> getDeclinedInvitations()
      Gets the list of invitations the user has declined.
      Returns:
      Unmodifiable list of declined invitation event names.

    • setDeclinedInvitations

      public void setDeclinedInvitations(List<String> declinedInvitations)
      Sets the list of declined invitations.
      Parameters:
      declinedInvitations - List of event names.

    • getWaitlistedEvents

      public List<String> getWaitlistedEvents()
      Gets the list of events the user is currently waitlisted for.
      Returns:
      Unmodifiable list of waitlisted event names.

    • setWaitlistedEvents

      public void setWaitlistedEvents(List<String> waitlistedEvents)
      Sets the list of waitlisted events.
      Parameters:
      waitlistedEvents - List of event names.
